headline: Woman's 'I'm Not A Regular Mom, I'm A Cool Mom' T-Shirt Has Made Her Kids Transfer Schools
summary: They have asked to be homeschooled. She bought matching shirts for the whole family.
fullBody: Amanda CoolMom bought an 'I'm not a regular mom, I'm a cool mom' shirt. Her children are mortified. 'Mom, please,' her 14-year-old said. Amanda bought matching shirts for the whole family. 'We're cool now,' Amanda said. They are not. Her kids have started wearing hoodies over the shirts. They have requested homeschooling. Amanda is 'processing.'
